attempted_route: neurokit2.ecg_clean + ecg_peaks + hrv_time + hrv_frequency + hrv_nonlinear (default params, sampling_rate=100) → pd.concat → CSV
observation: AttributeError: module 'numpy' has no attribute 'trapz' inside neurokit2/signal/signal_power.py:_signal_power_instant_compute at np.trapz(); exit_code=1 after 1.7s
rationale: NumPy>=2.0 removed np.trapz (renamed to np.trapezoid), but the installed neurokit2 version still calls np.trapz internally; the library is incompatible with the environment's NumPy version.
recommended_alternative: Replace nk.hrv_frequency with scipy.signal.welch-based manual PSD integration using np.trapezoid (NumPy>=2.0 API) over VLF/LF/HF bands, or pin numpy<2.0 and use nk.hrv_frequency unchanged; alternatively call nk.hrv(rpeaks, sampling_rate=100) which wraps all three domains and may avoid the broken code path.
